title: Savory Velvety Cozy Chicken Stir-fry
description: This savory, velvety Filipino dish combines crispy air-fried chicken with a rich red wine sauce for a cozy and comforting meal.

ingredients.name: Red wine
ingredients.notes: dry red variety like Pinot Noir or Burgundy

instructions: Season the chicken pieces with paprika, salt, and pepper.
In a saucepan, sauté minced garlic and chopped onions until translucent.
Add red wine, chicken broth, thyme sprigs, and red pepper flakes. Bring to a boil then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Pour the sauce into an air fryer basket with the seasoned chicken pieces, making sure they are evenly coated in the sauce.
Air fry at 375°F (190°C) for about 20 minutes or until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Garnish with extra thyme sprigs if desired.
